description_long: This chest of drawers is constructed from light-colored wood and features a minimalist, blocky design. The upper section contains a single drawer with a hexagonal cutout serving as a handle, while the lower section appears to be a solid base with an arched cutout at the bottom center. The surfaces are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the natural wood grain. The sides are flat and flush, with no visible hardware or embellishments. The overall form is geometric and modern, with sharp edges and clean lines. The object is compact and sturdy, suitable for use in urban environments such as entryways, garages, or small apartments.
description: A compact, light wood chest of drawers with a hexagonal cutout handle and a minimalist, geometric design. Features a smooth finish and an arched cutout at the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hexagonal handle cutout on the upper drawer and the arched cutout at the base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the blocky, flush profile with no visible handles or cutouts.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view, mirroring the main front but with the handle on the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain, flat side surface.
